name: Green Peppercorn-Raspberry Sauce
recipeIngredient: Giblets from roasted duck, roughly chopped
2 tbsp Green peppercorns in water, drained
recipeInstructions:
Raspberries, a member of the rose family, impart a delicious aroma and spark of flavor to this creative sauce. It is especially good with roast duckling.
Combine wine, broth, preserves, and giblets in a saucepan and bring to a boil over medium heat on the stove. Cook until liquid is reduced by about 1/2. Add cream and continue to cook until liquid reduces enough to coat the back of a spoon. Remove from heat and whisk in butter. Strain sauce into a serving bowl and discard giblets. Stir in peppercorns and serve with roasted bird.
Makes 1 1/2 Cups
